parameters.query:
SELECT
  week_start,
  accounts_intercepted,
  conversations_started,
  churn_prevented,
  csm_escalations,
  messages_sent,
  messages_replied
FROM v_weekly_stats
WHERE week_start = date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days')::DATE
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_tier = 'Critical') AS critical_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_tier = 'High')     AS high_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_tier = 'Medium')   AS medium_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE risk_tier = 'Low')      AS low_count,
  COUNT(*)                                        AS total_accounts,
  ROUND(AVG(churn_probability)::NUMERIC, 4)      AS avg_churn_prob
FROM accounts
WHERE churn_probability IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO weekly_reports (
  week_start, week_end,
  accounts_intercepted, conversations_started, churn_prevented,
  csm_escalations, messages_sent, messages_replied,
  report_data, sent_to, sent_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.weekStart }}',
  '{{ $json.weekEnd }}',
  {{ $json.intercepted }},
  {{ $json.conversations }},
  {{ $json.prevented }},
  {{ $json.escalations }},
  {{ $json.sent }},
  {{ $json.replied }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.reportData) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{HEAD_OF_CS_EMAIL}}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (week_start) DO UPDATE SET
  accounts_intercepted = EXCLUDED.accounts_intercepted,
  conversations_started = EXCLUDED.conversations_started,
  churn_prevented       = EXCLUDED.churn_prevented,
  csm_escalations       = EXCLUDED.csm_escalations,
  messages_sent         = EXCLUDED.messages_sent,
  messages_replied      = EXCLUDED.messages_replied,
  report_data           = EXCLUDED.report_data,
  sent_at               = NOW();
